_meta.purpose: Phase ME (Modify Existing) tunables. Loaded at fire time by MEContextPlanner — every value here is hot-reloadable via refreshMchataisourceCache (zero rebuild). When iterating planner success rate, EDIT THIS FILE FIRST, not Swift.

tree._doc: Bounds for the working-folder file enumeration that gets handed to the LLM-locator.
tree._doc_maxFiles: Soft cap on number of code files surfaced to the locator prompt. Bigger = more recall but more tokens. Cap was 200/800 — bumped to 2000 after diag found the iOS source dir was being truncated out of large monorepos. Keep in mind the prompt-budget hint below.
tree._doc_promptCharBudget: Hard truncation applied to the tree text in the locator prompt. Was 16000 — bumped to 60000 to match maxFiles=2000 (avg 50 chars/path). Cheap-tier models (Haiku/Flash) handle ~100k input cleanly.
tree._doc_codeExtensions: File extensions the enumerator considers. Add 'rb' for Ruby projects, 'cs' for Unity, etc.
tree._doc_skipDirs: Exact-match directory names to prune entirely. mchatai-source/community-extensions/ is content, not platform code we'd modify.
tree._doc_skipDirSubstrings: Substring patterns matched against each path component. Catches generated-artifact dirs like iconmaker_shortlist_3plus/ that frequently dominate large monorepos.

locator._doc: Stage-1.a — LLM-locator that picks 1-3 candidate files from the tree.
locator._doc_maxTokens: Output budget for the locator response. 600 is plenty for the JSON shape {files,confidence,reasoning}.
locator._doc_maxFilesPicked: Hard cap on files the locator can return. Validation drops anything beyond this.
locator._doc_promptKey: PromptTemplateService key for the locator system prompt. Edit me.locator.system.md to tune locator behavior — no rebuild needed.

snippetExtractor._doc: Stage-1.b — for each planned file over inlineBudgetLines, run an LLM call to pick the most-relevant 50-150 line region.
snippetExtractor._doc_inlineBudgetLines: Files at or under this many lines bypass the picker — whole file is passed to the executor. Tune up if cheap-tier model handles bigger files; tune down to save cost.
snippetExtractor._doc_fileDumpCharBudget: Hard truncation applied to the numbered file dump fed to the snippet picker. Larger files get a head-truncation marker.
snippetExtractor._doc_regionLines: The picker is prompted to pick 50-150 lines. We clamp the LLM's output to this range — it sometimes drifts.
snippetExtractor._doc_fallback: When the picker LLM call fails entirely, we fall back to head(N) + elision + tail(M). Better than dropping the file silently.
snippetExtractor._doc_promptKey: PromptTemplateService key for the snippet-picker system prompt.

executor._doc: Stage-2 — turns the planner's polished context into a unified diff.
executor._doc_contentBudgets: Char limits applied to the {{targetFileContent}} substitution before the executor LLM fires. Multi-file uses a bigger budget because each snippet ships with a header line.
executor._doc_cliMaxTurns: Max turns the Claude Code CLI executor can take. ME.0 is one-shot in spirit but Claude Code may need 2-3 reads + 1 emit, so 6 is safe.
